name: Olive Garden Capellini Primavera (Light)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Broccoli florets, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 1/4 cups Halved yellow squash, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick saucepan, heat olive oil and butter over medium-high heat for 30 seconds.
2. Add broccoli, onions, and carrots; sauté until the carrots are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, squash, and garlic; sauté an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in 1 1/2 cups water and the remaining ingredients; cook, stirring until just below boiling point.
5. Lower heat, cover, and simmer until vegetables are tender, approximately 8-10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water until tender, about 6-8 minutes. Drain and transfer to a serving bowl.
7. Toss the pasta with the sauce and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
Serving (2 cups) provides: 1/2 Fat, 5 Vegetables, 6 Carbohydrates. Per serving: 286 calories, 13 gm protein; 51 gm carbohydrates; 5 gm fat; 88 mg sodium; 8 gm fiber.
